prompt: A MoonBit function appends `body-1`, then enters an inner block that appends `inner-body` and has `defer log.push("deferred-inner")`; after the block it appends `body-2`. The outer block registered `deferred-first` before `body-1` and registers `deferred-second` before `body-2`. What is the exact comma-separated log after the function returns? Put only the sequence on the first line, then briefly explain the scope and order.
